name: reminders-blade-mcp
title: Apple Reminders
description: Apple Reminders operations — lists, reminders, search, due dates, create, complete, update, delete
author: groupthink-dev
notes: macOS only. Requires Reminders permission (auto-prompted on first AppleScript access).

setup.blurb: Read and manage Apple Reminders — lists, due dates, search, create, complete, and update reminders on macOS.
setup.help_text: Grant Reminders access when macOS prompts, or enable it in System Settings > Privacy & Security > Reminders for your terminal emulator.

fields.label: Enable Write Operations
fields.help: Set to 'true' to enable creating, completing, updating, and deleting reminders. All writes require additional confirmation.

prerequisites: Reminders permission for terminal (auto-prompted on first use)
